802.title: Mary Berry Cooks : A Dinner Party
802.description: Mary shows how to cook dishes to impress guests at a dinner party without getting hot and bothered in the kitchen, including two delicious canapés, a salmon and asparagus starter, a main course of guinea fowl and a decadent chocolate tart.
